settings_avatar_none_desc: No custom avatar is configured yet.
settings_avatar_gravatar_desc: Use the Gravatar image derived from your email address.
settings_avatar_upload_desc: Use an uploaded avatar optimized for the panel.
settings_avatar_crop_desc: Move the crop box, resize it from the edges, and watch the live preview update on the left.
settings_avatar_crop_output_hint: Exports a square avatar up to {{size}}.
settings_avatar_crop_hint: The image keeps its original aspect ratio and is not dragged or stretched. Only the circular crop box changes position and size.
